articles.description: “I’m just happy to be here because, if you ⁠look at my season and how it went, normally I should never have been at the World Cup,” said Lukaku on Monday.

articles.title: Zulu Proverb of the Day: 'Imvu ibulala indhlovu' - 'A sheep kills an elephant'
articles.description: Zulu Proverb of the Day: A Zulu proverb, "Imvu ibulala indhlovu," meaning "A sheep kills an elephant," powerfully illustrates that strength isn't solely about size. It highlights how persistence, strategy, and unity can overcome seemingly insurmountable odds. This ancient wisdom remains remarkably relevant today, reminding us that even the smallest efforts can create significant change and that no one should be underestimated. It champions resilience and humility in a world often focused on dominance.

articles.title: Former Titans player Chris Johnson's resurfaced video is hard to watch after his life-changing announcement
articles.description: Former NFL and Tennessee Titans star player Chris Johnson's recent ALS diagnosis has cast a poignant new light on a video of him coaching at the 2025 Senior Bowl. Despite battling the disease, which has affected his speech, Chris Johnson displayed remarkable strength and a commitment to mentoring young talent.

articles.description: Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill saved from Havertz and Nick Woltemade, but his teammates blew two chances to win it before Jose Canale blasted in the winning spot-kick after Tah had blazed his effort over the bar

articles.title: Germany out of World Cup in historic penalty shootout loss to Paraguay
articles.description: Germany has been eliminated from the 2026 FIFA World Cup after their first-ever penalty shootout loss in the tournament. The four-time champions lost 4-3 on penalties to Paraguay after a 1-1 draw in a major upset in the Round of 32.

articles.title: Paraguay end Germany's 44-year historic World Cup streak as football's greatest reputation finally falls
articles.description: Germany’s long-standing reputation as World Cup penalty shootout specialists came to an end as Paraguay defeated them 4–3 on penalties after a 1–1 draw in Boston. It was Germany’s first-ever shootout loss, ending a 44-year perfect record dating back to 1982. Despite dominance in possession, missed penalties proved decisive, while Paraguay maintained their flawless shootout record.

articles.title: Germany and Paraguay head to extra time at 1-1 in round of 32 at World Cup
FIFA World Cup 2026: Another shocker as Netherlands knocked out by Morocco after shootout drama
articles.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32: Morocco defeated the Netherlands in a penalty shoot-out to advance to the last 16 of the World Cup on Monday after a thrilling battle in Monterrey finished 1-1 after extra-time. An enthralling match had gone to extra time after Issa Diop had glanced in a dramatic equaliser for Morocco in the first minute of stoppage time as the Netherlands closed in on victory.

articles.title: Manuel Neuer Equals Unwanted Record Of Conceding In Most Consecutive FIFA World Cup Matches
articles.description: Before Neuer, only one goalkeeper — Mexico's Antonio Carbajal.— had conceded in 10 consecutive FIFA World Cup matches.

articles.title: McCullum pays emotional tribute to Stokes, a 'leader of men'

articles.description: Chris Martin is playing a key role in shaping the 2026 FIFA World Cup final halftime show, collaborating with BTS, Madonna and Shakira on its creative vision. Global Citizen CEO Hugh Evans praised Martin's dedication, saying he believes the project can "make a contribution to humanity." Meanwhile, BTS topped Billboard's fan poll with over 8 million votes, making them the most anticipated performers ahead of the historic July 19 halftime show at MetLife Stadium.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys linked to $53 Million Indianapolis Colts star in blockbuster trade proposal
articles.description: The Dallas Cowboys have been named a potential landing spot for Indianapolis Colts star Jonathan Taylor in a proposed trade. CBS Sports' Garrett Podell suggested the All-Pro running back could be available for a third-round pick if the Colts struggle in 2026. With Taylor entering the final year of his contract and coming off another standout season, Dallas could pursue him if its rushing attack fails to meet expectations.

articles.title: Fitness concerns cloud Romelu Lukaku ahead of Belgium's World Cup knockout clash against Senegal
articles.description: Belgium faces Senegal in a crucial World Cup clash, with star striker Romelu Lukaku's fitness a major concern. Despite a season marred by injury, the veteran forward is determined to contribute, having shown flashes of brilliance as a substitute. With key teammates aging, this tournament is a final chance for Belgium's 'Golden Generation' to make their mark, but they must overcome a resilient Senegalese side.

articles.title: As Cabo Verde's fairytale journey continues at the FIFA World Cup, the tiny island just pulled off one of nature’s greatest comeback stories
articles.description: While Cabo Verde earns international attention for its inspiring FIFA World Cup journey, the island nation is also celebrating an extraordinary environmental achievement. A new study published in Biological Conservation reports that loggerhead turtle nesting activity on Boa Vista increased 80-fold between 1998 and 2024 following decades of conservation efforts.
